_comment: Copy the contents of `mcpServers` into your Windsurf MCP config at `~/.codeium/windsurf/mcp_config.json` (macOS/Linux) or `%APPDATA%\Codeium\windsurf\mcp_config.json` (Windows). `EUSTRESS_UNIVERSE` is optional — the server auto-detects the enclosing Universe from the working directory and lets the AI switch via `eustress_set_default_universe` mid-session. Set `EUSTRESS_UNIVERSES_PATH` to a platform-separator-delimited list of folders the server should scan when `eustress_list_universes` is called.
